parameters.query:
UPDATE agent_tasks
SET status = 'in_progress', updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $('GetPendingJob').first().json.id }}'::uuid
RETURNING id::text;

SELECT id::text, channel_id, name as title,
       prompts->>'context' as instructions,
       agent,
       depends_on::text    as depends_on,
       parent_task_id::text as parent_task_id
FROM agent_tasks t
WHERE status = 'pending'
AND   type   = 'task'
AND NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM   agent_tasks d
  WHERE  d.id::text = ANY(
    SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text(t.depends_on)
  )
  AND    d.status != 'completed'
)
ORDER BY created_at ASC
LIMIT 1;

UPDATE agent_tasks
SET status = 'completed',
    result = to_json('{{ $('Call _BaxterCore').first().json.AgentOutput.response.replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::text)::jsonb,
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $('GetPendingJob').first().json.id }}'::uuid;

SELECT
  pt.name                        AS parent_name,
  pt.prompts->>'user'            AS parent_goal,
  CASE
    WHEN t.parent_task_id IS NULL THEN NULL
    ELSE (
      SELECT json_agg(
               json_build_object('name', s.name, 'result', s.result#>>'{}')
               ORDER BY s.created_at
             )
      FROM   agent_tasks s
      WHERE  s.parent_task_id = t.parent_task_id
      AND    s.id             != t.id
      AND    s.status          = 'completed'
    )
  END AS completed_siblings
FROM  agent_tasks t
LEFT JOIN agent_tasks pt ON pt.id = t.parent_task_id
WHERE t.id = '{{ $('GetPendingJob').first().json.id }}'::uuid;
